---
title: "Lit review"
author: "Abby Lewis"
date: "2025-10-24"
output: html_document
---

Setup: load data and functions

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(tidyverse)
library(stringi)
library(data.table)

# Load files
files <- list.files("../WoS_downloads", full.names = T, pattern = ".xls")
library(readxl)
all <- lapply(files, read_excel, col_types = "text") %>%
  bind_rows() %>%
  rename(
    TI = `Article Title`,
    AB = Abstract,
    PY = `Publication Year`
  ) %>%
  select(TI, AB, PY) %>%
  mutate(PY = as.numeric(PY)) %>%
  distinct()

# All
tots <- read_delim("../WoS_downloads/analyze (1).txt", delim = "\t") %>%
  rename(PY = `Publication Years`,
         Count = `Record Count`)
```

Identify memory/legacy in title/abstract

```{r}
# Identify legacy terms
all_classified <- all %>%
  mutate(full_text = tolower(paste(TI, AB))) %>%
  select(-AB) %>% # decrease df size
  mutate(
    Memory = grepl("\\bmemor", full_text, ignore.case = T),
    Legacy = grepl("\\blegac", full_text, ignore.case = T),
    Lag = grepl("\\blags?\\b", full_text, ignore.case = T),
    LSTM = grepl("long[- ]short[- ]term[- ]memory", 
                 full_text, ignore.case = TRUE),
    Mem_not_lstm = grepl("\\bmemor", 
                         gsub("long[- ]short[- ]term[- ]memory",
                             "",
                             full_text, ignore.case = T),
                         ignore.case = T)
  ) 

#Plot each over time
all_classified %>%
  select(PY, Memory, Legacy, Lag, LSTM, Mem_not_lstm) %>%
  pivot_longer(-PY) %>%
  group_by(PY, name) %>%
  summarize(sum = sum(value)) %>%
  left_join(tots) %>%
  filter(PY < 2026,
         PY >= 1980) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = PY, y = sum/Count*100, color = name)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5)+
  geom_smooth()+
  scale_color_manual(name = "Term",
                     values = c("purple2","blue3", "lightblue3", "turquoise4", "green4"))+
  ylab("Percentage of all ecology/hydrology papers")+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "none")+
  facet_wrap(~name)

#Focus on legacy and memory
all_classified %>%
  select(PY, Legacy, Mem_not_lstm) %>%
  mutate(Both = ifelse(Legacy & Mem_not_lstm,
                       T, F),
         Legacy = ifelse(Both, F, Legacy),
         Mem_not_lstm = ifelse(Both, F, Mem_not_lstm)) %>%
  pivot_longer(-PY) %>%
  group_by(PY, name) %>%
  summarize(sum = sum(value)) %>%
  left_join(tots) %>%
  filter(PY < 2026,
         PY >= 1980) %>%
  mutate(name = factor(name, levels = c("Legacy", "Both", "Mem_not_lstm"))) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = PY, y = sum/Count*100, fill = name)) +
  geom_area()+
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Term",
                     values = c("#FB8B24", "#36494E", "#3E92CC"),
                    breaks = c("Legacy", "Both", "Mem_not_lstm"),
                    labels = c("Legacy", "Both", "Memory (not LSTM)"))+
  ylab("Percentage of all ecology/hydrology papers")+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank())
```

By discipline

```{r}
#Focus on legacy and memory
discipline <- all_classified %>%
  mutate(
    Ecology = grepl("\\becolog", full_text, ignore.case = T),
    Ecosystem = grepl("\\becosystem", full_text, ignore.case = T),
    Hydrology = grepl("\\bhydrolog", full_text, ignore.case = T)
  ) %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    Discipline = paste(
      c('"Ecology"', '"Ecosystem"', '"Hydrology"')[c(Ecology, Ecosystem, Hydrology)],
      collapse = " and "
    ),
    Discipline = ifelse(Discipline == "", NA, Discipline),
    Discipline = ifelse(
      Ecology & Ecosystem & Hydrology,
      "All",
      Discipline
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

discipline %>%
  select(PY, Legacy, Mem_not_lstm, Discipline) %>%
  mutate(Both = ifelse(Legacy & Mem_not_lstm,
                       T, F),
         Legacy = ifelse(Both, F, Legacy),
         Mem_not_lstm = ifelse(Both, F, Mem_not_lstm)) %>%
  pivot_longer(-c(PY, Discipline)) %>%
  group_by(PY, name, Discipline) %>%
  summarize(sum = sum(value)) %>%
  left_join(tots) %>%
  filter(PY < 2026,
         PY >= 1980) %>%
  mutate(name = factor(name, levels = c("Legacy", "Both", "Mem_not_lstm"))) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = PY, y = sum/Count*100, fill = name)) +
  geom_area()+
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Term",
                     values = c("#FB8B24", "#36494E", "#3E92CC"),
                    breaks = c("Legacy", "Both", "Mem_not_lstm"),
                    labels = c("Legacy", "Both", "Memory (not LSTM)"))+
  ylab("Percentage of all ecology/hydrology papers")+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank())+
  facet_wrap(~Discipline)

discipline %>%
  select(Legacy, Mem_not_lstm, Discipline) %>%
  mutate(Both = ifelse(Legacy & Mem_not_lstm,
                       T, F),
         Legacy = ifelse(Both, F, Legacy),
         Mem_not_lstm = ifelse(Both, F, Mem_not_lstm)) %>%
  pivot_longer(-c(Discipline)) %>%
  group_by(name, Discipline) %>%
  summarize(sum = sum(value), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(Discipline) %>%
  mutate(tot = sum(sum),
         pct = sum/tot * 100,
         n_lab = paste0(tot, ' papers'),
         name = factor(name, levels = c("Legacy", "Both", "Mem_not_lstm"))) %>%
  ggplot(aes(y = Discipline, x = pct)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = name))+
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 100), clip = "off", expand = F)+
  geom_text(aes(x = 101, label = n_lab), hjust = 0,
            data = . %>% select(tot, Discipline, n_lab) %>% distinct(),
            size = 3)+
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Term",
                     values = c("#FB8B24", "#36494E", "#3E92CC"),
                    breaks = c("Legacy", "Both", "Mem_not_lstm"),
                    labels = c("Legacy", "Both", "Memory (not LSTM)"))+
  ylab("Discipline mentioned")+
  xlab("Percent of papers")+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",
        plot.margin = unit(c(5, 60, 5, 5), units = "pt"))
```

By ecosystem

```{r}
#Focus on legacy and memory
ecosystem <- discipline %>%
  select(all_of(c(colnames(all_classified), "Discipline"))) %>%
  mutate(
    Lake = grepl("\\blake", full_text, ignore.case = T),
    Wetland = grepl("\\bwetland", full_text, ignore.case = T),
    Stream = grepl("\\bstream", full_text, ignore.case = T),
    River = grepl("\\briver", full_text, ignore.case = T),
    Grassland = grepl("\\bgrass|\\bprarie|\\bsavanna", full_text, ignore.case = T),
    Forest = grepl("\\bforest", full_text, ignore.case = T),
    Pond = grepl("\\bpond", full_text, ignore.case = T),
    Marine = grepl("\\bmarine|\\bocean", full_text, ignore.case = T),
    Soil = grepl("\\bsoil", full_text, ignore.case = T)
  ) %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    Ecosystem = paste(
      c('"Lake"', '"Wetland"', '"Stream"', '"River"', '"Grassland"', 
        '"Forest"', '"Pond"', '"Marine"', '"Soil"')[
          c(Lake, Wetland, Stream, River, Grassland, Forest, Pond, Marine, Soil)],
      collapse = " and "
    ),
    Ecosystem = ifelse(Ecosystem == "", NA, Ecosystem)) %>%
  ungroup()

ecosystem %>%
  select(PY, Legacy, Mem_not_lstm, Ecosystem) %>%
  mutate(Both = ifelse(Legacy & Mem_not_lstm,
                       T, F),
         Legacy = ifelse(Both, F, Legacy),
         Mem_not_lstm = ifelse(Both, F, Mem_not_lstm)) %>%
  pivot_longer(-c(PY, Ecosystem)) %>%
  group_by(PY, name, Ecosystem) %>%
  summarize(sum = sum(value)) %>%
  left_join(tots) %>%
  filter(PY < 2026,
         PY >= 1980) %>%
  mutate(name = factor(name, levels = c("Legacy", "Both", "Mem_not_lstm"))) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = PY, y = sum/Count*100, fill = name)) +
  geom_area()+
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Term",
                     values = c("#FB8B24", "#36494E", "#3E92CC"),
                    breaks = c("Legacy", "Both", "Mem_not_lstm"),
                    labels = c("Legacy", "Both", "Memory (not LSTM)"))+
  ylab("Percentage of all ecology/hydrology papers")+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank())+
  facet_wrap(~Ecosystem)

ecosystem %>%
  select(Legacy, Mem_not_lstm, Ecosystem) %>%
  mutate(Both = ifelse(Legacy & Mem_not_lstm,
                       T, F),
         Legacy = ifelse(Both, F, Legacy),
         Mem_not_lstm = ifelse(Both, F, Mem_not_lstm)) %>%
  pivot_longer(-c(Ecosystem)) %>%
  group_by(name, Ecosystem) %>%
  summarize(sum = sum(value), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(Ecosystem) %>%
  mutate(tot = sum(sum),
         pct = sum/tot * 100,
         n_lab = paste0(tot, ' papers'),
         name = factor(name, levels = c("Legacy", "Both", "Mem_not_lstm"))) %>%
  filter(tot > 200,
         !is.na(Ecosystem)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(y = Ecosystem, x = pct)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = name))+
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 100), clip = "off", expand = F)+
  geom_text(aes(x = 101, label = n_lab), hjust = 0,
            data = . %>% select(tot, Ecosystem, n_lab) %>% distinct(),
            size = 3)+
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Term",
                     values = c("#FB8B24", "#36494E", "#3E92CC"),
                    breaks = c("Legacy", "Both", "Mem_not_lstm"),
                    labels = c("Legacy", "Both", "Memory (not LSTM)"))+
  ylab("Ecosystem mentioned")+
  xlab("Percent of papers")+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",
        plot.margin = unit(c(5, 60, 5, 5), units = "pt"))
```

Export

```{r}
out <- ecosystem %>%
  select(all_of(c(colnames(all_classified), "Discipline", "Ecosystem")))

write_csv(out, "../Compiled_data/full_dataset_classified.csv")
write_csv(out %>%
            filter(grepl("Stream|River", Ecosystem)),
          "../Compiled_data/streams_and_rivers.csv")
```

Count the various words that come after memory

```{r}
next_df <- all_classified %>%
  mutate(
    next_mem = str_match_all(
      full_text,
      "['\"]?\\bmemory\\b['\"]?\\s+of\\s+(?:the\\s+|an\\s+|a\\s+)?(\\w+)"
    ) %>%
      lapply(function(x) unique(x[,2])),
    next_leg = str_match_all(
      full_text,
      "['\"]?\\blegac(?:y|ies)\\b['\"]?\\s+of\\s+(?:the\\s+|an\\s+|a\\s+)?(\\w+)"
    ) %>%
      lapply(function(x) unique(na.omit(x[,2])))
  )

next_word_counts_mem <- next_df %>%
  select(next_mem) %>%
  unnest(next_mem) %>%
  count(next_mem, sort = T)

next_word_counts_leg <- next_df %>%
  select(next_leg) %>%
  unnest(next_leg) %>%
  count(next_leg, sort = T)
```

Count the various words that come before memory

```{r}
prev_df <- all_classified %>%
  mutate(
    prev_mem = str_match_all(
      full_text,
      "(\\w+)\\s+['\"]?\\bmemory\\b['\"]?"
    ) %>%
      lapply(function(x) unique(na.omit(x[,2]))),

    prev_leg = str_match_all(
      full_text,
      "(\\w+)\\s+['\"]?\\blegac(?:y|ies)\\b['\"]?"
    ) %>%
      lapply(function(x) unique(na.omit(x[,2])))
  )

prev_word_counts_mem <- prev_df %>%
  select(prev_mem) %>%
  unnest(prev_mem) %>%
  count(prev_mem, sort = T)

prev_word_counts_leg <- prev_df %>%
  select(prev_leg) %>%
  unnest(prev_leg) %>%
  count(prev_leg, sort = T)
```

Time units

```{r}
driver_df <- all_classified %>%
  mutate(
    Year = grepl("\\byear", full_text, ignore.case = T),
    Season = grepl("\\bseason", full_text, ignore.case = T),
    Month = grepl("\\bmonth", full_text, ignore.case = T),
    Day = grepl("\\bday", full_text, ignore.case = T),
    Decade = grepl("\\bdecade", full_text, ignore.case = T),
    Century = grepl("\\bcentur|centennial", full_text, ignore.case = T),
    Hour = grepl("\\bhour", full_text, ignore.case = T),
    Minute = grepl("\\bminute", full_text, ignore.case = T)
  )

driver_df %>%
  select(Mem_not_lstm, Legacy, Lag, Century, Decade, Year, Season, Month, Day, Hour, Minute) %>%
  pivot_longer(c(Mem_not_lstm, Legacy, Lag)) %>%
  filter(value) %>%
  group_by(name) %>%
  summarize(across(c(Century, Decade, Year, Season, Month, Day, Hour, Minute), sum),
            tot = n()) %>%
  pivot_longer(c(Century, Decade, Year, Season, Month, Day, Hour, Minute), 
               names_to = "Time", values_to = "sum") %>%
  mutate(pct = sum/tot*100,
         Time = factor(Time,
                       levels = c("Century","Decade", "Year", "Season",
                                  "Month", "Day", "Hour", "Minute"))) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Time, y = pct, fill = name))+
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Term",
                     values = c("#FB8B24", "#3E92CC", "grey40"),
                    breaks = c("Legacy", "Mem_not_lstm", "Lag"),
                    labels = c("Legacy", "Memory (not LSTM)", "Lag"))+
  geom_col(position = "dodge")+
  theme_bw()+
  xlab("Time unit mentioned")+
  ylab("Percent of papers")
```

Look at how memory and legacy are used in context

```{r}
look_df <- all_classified %>%
  mutate(
    sentences = str_split(full_text, "(?<=[.!?])\\s+"),
    
    mem_sent = lapply(sentences, function(x) {
      unique(x[str_detect(x, "(?i)\\bmemory\\b")])
    }),
    
    leg_sent = lapply(sentences, function(x) {
      unique(x[str_detect(x, "(?i)\\blegac(?:y|ies)\\b")])
    })
  )

look_df$mem_sent[nchar(look_df$mem_sent)>12]
```
